Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 21 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. RubyGems Fracture Incident Report 56 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 81 upvotes, 19 comments
  6. Tell HN: Chrome says "suspicious download" when trying to download yt-dlp 216 upvotes, 65 comments
  7. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 192 upvotes, 57 comments
  8. Combinators 105 upvotes, 29 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1656 upvotes, 650 comments
  10. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 424 upvotes, 152 comments
  11. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 267 upvotes, 98 comments
  12. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 33 upvotes, 7 comments
  13. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 235 upvotes, 88 comments
  14. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 69 upvotes, 23 comments
  15. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1401 upvotes, 731 comments
  16. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 566 upvotes, 288 comments
  17. Multiple Sclerosis 54 upvotes, 20 comments
  18. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 27 upvotes, 8 comments
  19. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 17 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. Forth VM and compiler written in C++ and Scryer Prolog 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 153 upvotes, 91 comments
  22. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 92 upvotes, 57 comments
  23. Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 172 upvotes, 121 comments
  24. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 649 upvotes, 535 comments
  25. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. A Love Letter to 'Girl Games' 97 upvotes, 84 comments
  27. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 15 upvotes, 9 comments
  28. Objections to systemd age-attestation changes go overboard 5 upvotes, 2 comments
  29. Good code will still win 31 upvotes, 57 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:30am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
